meaning: n.中央大厅(古希腊和小亚细亚建筑的中央部分,由敞廊、门厅和大厅三部分组成,中间有火炉及宝座,周围4根木柱)
examples: The megaron was found in all Mycenaean palaces and also in houses.
Megaron: in ancient Greece and the Middle East, an architectural form consisting of a porch, vestibule, and large hall with a central hearth.
The megaron was found in all Mycenae an palaces and also in houses. it probably originated in the Middle East later attaining the uniquely Aegean aspect of the open porch supported by columns.
